title: Magic  Origins
description: An origins mod addon that adds loads of new origins.
body:
## If you have any issues please report them in the discord server.


## Mods needed. 
Origins
Pehkui 


# Origins



**Mimmic**
> _A sneaky chest that can hide in plain sight._
#
**Panda**
> _A vegetarian with a love for bamboo._
#
**Pirate** 
> _Wanderer of the seas with a passion for treasure._
#
**Necromancer**
> _The summoner of the undead._
#
**Cyborg**
> _Half Man, Half Robot._
#
**Undead**
> _Master of the night and a person of the non living._
#
**Yin & Yang**
> _The duo which are complete opposites in 1 person._
#
**Green Dragon** 
> _Large mythical beast of the villagers._
#
**Druid** 
> _Magic caster of the forest._
#
**Magical Fly** 
> _Dainty being who is very small._
#
**Superior Dwarf** 
> _Miner and citizen of the caves._
#
**Kraken** 
> _Protector and beast of the ocean._
#
**Red Dragon** 
> _A dragon with no wings sadly, although they don't need them to pack a punch._
#
**Lorax** 
> _A tiny creature with a love for trees and nature._
#
**Hydra** 
> _A wildren beast from Greek mythology._
#


## Links
[CurseForge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/magic-origins "Curseforge")
